# CKEditor 5 Vendor Files

This directory contains CKEditor 5 browser distribution files used by the `ckeditor` plugin in self-hosted mode.

Included files:

- `ckeditor5.umd.js`
- `ckeditor5.css`
- `COPYING.GPL`
- `LICENSE.md`

Version: `48.1.0`

Source package:

- `ckeditor5@48.1.0` from the npm registry
- Browser files copied from `dist/browser/`

The JavaScript and CSS files do not include source map comments in this repository, so browser devtools do not request external map URLs. The files are provided by CKSource. See CKEditor licensing terms before deploying with a non-GPL license key:

- `https://ckeditor.com/legal/ckeditor-licensing-options`
- `https://ckeditor.com/docs/ckeditor5/latest/getting-started/licensing/license-key-and-activation.html`
